author: phase-4-coordinator
content:
Implemented broadcasting for ferray-ufunc binary ops (issue #379). Chose option (1): make all binary ops broadcast by default within the same dimension type, matching NumPy semantics. Cross-rank broadcasting is still handled by binary_broadcast_op (returns IxDyn) and the ferray-core add_broadcast/sub_broadcast/mul_broadcast/div_broadcast/rem_broadcast methods.

Changes:

1. ferray-ufunc/src/helpers.rs: rewrote binary_float_op and binary_map_op to fast-path on identical shapes and broadcast otherwise via broadcast_shapes + broadcast_to + Dimension::from_dim_slice. Also rewrote f16 helpers to delegate to the new binary helpers (was: duplicated shape-check logic). Added new binary_mixed_op<T,U,V,D> helper for ops where the two arrays have different element types (left_shift uses Array<u32>, ldexp uses Array<i32>).

2. ferray-ufunc/src/ops/arithmetic.rs: refactored add/subtract/multiply/divide to call binary_float_op directly (was: inline shape check + zip). Updated divmod to use a closure-shared kernel routed through both fast and broadcast paths. Refactored gcd_int/lcm_int to call binary_float_op.

3. ferray-ufunc/src/ops/bitwise.rs: left_shift/right_shift now use binary_mixed_op (Array<T> shifted by Array<u32>).

4. ferray-ufunc/src/ops/floatintrinsic.rs: ldexp now uses binary_mixed_op (Array<f64> with Array<i32> exponents).

5. All routes through binary_float_op or binary_map_op automatically broadcast: bitwise_and/or/xor, all comparison ops (equal/not_equal/less/less_equal/greater/greater_equal/isclose), all logical ops (logical_and/or/xor), true_divide, floor_divide, power, remainder, mod_, fmod, plus the many other ops that use these helpers.

6. ferray-test-oracle/src/lib.rs: removed the obsolete "skip broadcast cases" branch in run_binary_f64_oracle so fixture rows with broadcast-compatible shapes are exercised.

7. 24 new tests across helpers.rs, arithmetic.rs (add/subtract/multiply/divide/power/remainder/divmod/gcd_int/lcm_int), comparison.rs (equal/less/isclose), logical.rs (and/or), bitwise.rs (and/or/left_shift/right_shift), and floatintrinsic.rs (ldexp).

8. Adjacent cleanup of preexisting clippy errors in ufunc test files: 42 redundant_closure warnings in tests/oracle.rs (added file-level allow with comment explaining the closures provide type-inference context for the macro pattern), 1 manual_range_contains in tests/property_tests.rs (rewrote as ..=.contains), 1 double_comparisons in tests/property_tests.rs (val > 0 || val == 0 → val >= 0).

Result: 206 ferray-ufunc tests pass (was 182, +24), full workspace tests pass, ferray-ufunc clippy clean. Closing as completed.
